projectDescription: A GitHub Action that detects added, copied, modified, deleted, renamed, type-changed, unmerged, and unknown files across pull requests, pushes, and other workflow events.
keyFeatures: Detects all file change types: Added, Copied, Modified, Deleted, Renamed, Type Changed, Unmerged, Unknown (ACMRDTUX)
Works with both git's native diff and GitHub's REST API
Supports glob pattern and YAML-based file filtering
Outputs JSON for matrix job workflows
Lists changed directories with configurable max depth
Supports monorepos, submodules, and self-hosted runners
Recovers deleted files to their original or a new location
Compatible with Linux, macOS, and Windows runners
Supports pull_request, push, merge_group, release, and many more events
publicApiSurface: inputs: sha, base_sha, since, until, since_last_remote_commit
inputs: separator, json, escape_json, matrix, safe_output
outputs: added_files, copied_files, modified_files, deleted_files, renamed_files
outputs: *_count variants for each file list output
